title: ANSIO® Garden Sprayer 5 litre Pressure Pump Action, Weed Killer,Water Pump Sprayer, Ideal with Pesticides, Insecticides, Fungicides.
features: 5 Litre Garden Sprayer with Visible Markings – This pump action pressure sprayer features a translucent tank with easy-to-read black level indicators in litres and ounces, ensuring accurate chemical mixing for every use. Ideal for gardens, greenhouses, and outdoor maintenance.

Versatile Use for Weed Killer and Fertilizers – Use this weed killer sprayer pump with water-based solutions such as pesticides, herbicides, fungicides, and liquid fertilizers. Perfect as a weed sprayer or garden sprayer pump for lawns, flower beds, and vegetable patches.

Wide Opening for Easy Filling and Cleaning – Designed with a 35mm top opening, this pump spray bottle allows for spill-free filling and fast cleaning. Includes a shoulder strap for portability and a lockable trigger for continuous spray mode—great for extended spray bottles gardening tasks.

Safe and Ergonomic Pump Sprayer Design – Built for comfort and safety, the weed sprayer pump 5L features an ergonomic D-handle for effortless pressure build-up and a safety release valve that automatically vents pressure above 3 bars. The angled nozzle makes spraying under leaves and hard-to-reach areas easier. Fully adjustable nozzle wand allows you to switch from a fine mist to a steady spray. Includes a lockable trigger for continuous spraying.

Reliable Sprayer for Year-Round Garden Care – From early spring pest control to summer weed sprayer treatments and autumn fertilizing, this sprayer is perfect for regular garden maintenance. A dependable tool for all sprayers for gardening needs
